feed.title: TonicBox/blog
feed.subtitle: compilers, Java internals, tooling, and debugging war stories

entry.title: RBP, and only RBP: losing a register to SEH
entry.summary: Misadventures fighting with Windows over RBP.

entry.title: The loop that ate its own body
entry.summary: A missing FPS counter, an empty mesh, and the decompiler bug behind them: how two continue statements convinced YABR's reconstructor to turn a while loop inside out.
